text:
If a replay loop at midnight is familiar, this overthinking pattern needs a better reset.

Try this. Write one fact, one fear. And one next action you can take in ten minutes. Keep it small enough to finish before your brain starts negotiating.

Bookmark the pattern. Signal, reset, next action. Anxious thoughts are proposals, not instructions.
mediaAltText: Faceless vertical short on overthinking (broll + CosyVoice bank VO)
